_info.text: This adapter automatically controls your Zendure Solarflow battery to achieve zero grid feed-in/draw. It reads grid power and adjusts battery charge/discharge accordingly.

zendureSolarflowInstance.label: Zendure Solarflow adapter instance
zendureSolarflowInstance.help: The instance name of the nograx zendure-solarflow adapter

deviceProductKey.label: Device ProductKey
deviceProductKey.help: The ProductKey of your Zendure device (e.g., for 1600AC+)

deviceKey.label: Device Key
deviceKey.help: The DeviceKey of your Zendure device

_deviceHint.text: 💡 You can find ProductKey and DeviceKey in the zendure-solarflow adapter object tree. Look for the device path structure.

powerMeterDp.label: Grid power meter datapoint
powerMeterDp.help: Select the datapoint that provides current grid power (positive = drawing from grid, negative = feeding to grid)

targetGridPowerW.label: Target grid power (W)
targetGridPowerW.help: Target grid power in watts. 0 = zero grid draw/feed, positive = allow some grid draw, negative = allow some grid feed

updateIntervalSec.label: Update interval (seconds)
updateIntervalSec.help: How often to update battery power (recommended: 5 seconds)

minBatterySoc.label: Minimum battery SOC (%)
minBatterySoc.help: Stop discharging when SOC falls below this value

maxBatterySoc.label: Maximum battery SOC (%)
maxBatterySoc.help: Stop charging when SOC reaches this value

minBatteryVoltageMv.label: Minimum battery voltage (mV)
minBatteryVoltageMv.help: Stop discharging when voltage falls below this value

enableCharge.label: Enable charging
enableCharge.help: Allow the adapter to charge the battery

enableDischarge.label: Enable discharging
enableDischarge.help: Allow the adapter to discharge the battery

useLowVoltageBlock.label: Use low voltage block
useLowVoltageBlock.help: Honor the lowVoltageBlock flag from the Zendure device

useFullChargeNeeded.label: Use full charge needed
useFullChargeNeeded.help: Honor the fullChargeNeeded flag from the Zendure device

hysteresisW.label: Hysteresis (W)
hysteresisW.help: Minimum power change required to update (avoids frequent small adjustments)

rampUpWPerCycle.label: Ramp-up limit (W/cycle)
rampUpWPerCycle.help: Maximum power increase per cycle (0 = unlimited)

rampDownWPerCycle.label: Ramp-down limit (W/cycle)
rampDownWPerCycle.help: Maximum power decrease per cycle (0 = unlimited)

_tuningHint.text: ⚙️ Ramp rates control how quickly the battery power can change. Higher values = faster response but more aggressive. Lower values = smoother but slower response.
